description: Chapter 2 data layer: new BarkEvents, SlicePhases, EnemyArchetypes, Maps, and TaxCollectorController. Extends all registries and the QuestbookProcessor with Chapter 2 reactions.
steps: 1. Add new BarkEvent enum values to composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/bark/BarkEvent.kt. Add a '// Chapter 2' section at the end with these values: NIB_SMELL_GOLD, NIB_HOW_MUCH, NIB_SECRET_ENTRANCE, BRUGG_WHO_RUNS_THIS_CITY, BRUGG_SPEAK_TO_GUARD, BRUGG_KEEP_TO_TRAIL, BRUGG_EXPERIENCE_IS_HOW_WE_GROW, VELLUM_CREATURES_IN_WOODS, VELLUM_ELEMENTS_MINE_TO_COMMAND, VELLUM_CALLS_FOR_LIGHTNING (UTILITY_BARK - activates shrine), VELLUM_SO_THATS_HOW_IT_IS, VELLUM_BALANCE_LIFE_DEATH, MERCHANT_SEE_IF_THIS_STRIKES_FANCY, MERCHANT_MAKE_ME_AN_OFFER, MERCHANT_NAME_YOUR_PRICE, GUARD_BACK_ALREADY (for the return dialogue). Note: BRUGG_DROP_YOUR_WEAPONS already exists and is the UTILITY_BARK in the boss fight.

2. Add BarkRegistry definitions for each new BarkEvent in composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/bark/BarkRegistry.kt. Follow the existing pattern: def(event, character, audioText, type, scope, cooldown, usedInSlice=true). The merchant and guard NPCs use BRUGG character (gruff voice). VELLUM_CALLS_FOR_LIGHTNING should be UTILITY_BARK type. NIB_SMELL_GOLD should be TRIGGER_BARK. BRUGG_WHO_RUNS_THIS_CITY and BRUGG_SPEAK_TO_GUARD should be TRIGGER_BARK. VELLUM_CREATURES_IN_WOODS is SAFE_BARK. VELLUM_ELEMENTS_MINE_TO_COMMAND is TRIGGER_BARK. VELLUM_BALANCE_LIFE_DEATH is SAFE_BARK. BRUGG_EXPERIENCE_IS_HOW_WE_GROW is SAFE_BARK.

3. Add BarkAudioRegistry WAV filename mappings for each new BarkEvent in composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/bark/BarkAudioRegistry.kt. Filenames: NIB_SMELL_GOLD -> 'i_smell_gold.wav', NIB_HOW_MUCH -> 'how_much_do_you_want_for_this.wav', NIB_SECRET_ENTRANCE -> 'this_looks_like_a_secret_entrance.wav', BRUGG_WHO_RUNS_THIS_CITY -> 'who_runs_this_city.wav', BRUGG_SPEAK_TO_GUARD -> 'i_need_to_speak_to_the_town_guard.wav', BRUGG_KEEP_TO_TRAIL -> 'just_keep_to_the_trail.wav', BRUGG_EXPERIENCE_IS_HOW_WE_GROW -> 'experience_is_how_we_grow.wav', VELLUM_CREATURES_IN_WOODS -> 'there_are_all_manner_of_creature_in_these_woods.wav' (NOTE: vellum directory has 'creature' without s), VELLUM_ELEMENTS_MINE_TO_COMMAND -> 'the_elements_are_mine_to_command.wav', VELLUM_CALLS_FOR_LIGHTNING -> 'this_calls_for_lightning.wav', VELLUM_SO_THATS_HOW_IT_IS -> 'so_thats_how_it_is_then.wav', VELLUM_BALANCE_LIFE_DEATH -> 'the_balance_of_life_and_death_sits_on_a_knifes_edge.wav', MERCHANT_SEE_IF_THIS_STRIKES_FANCY -> 'see_if_any_of_this_strikes_your_fancy.wav', MERCHANT_MAKE_ME_AN_OFFER -> 'make_me_an_offer.wav', MERCHANT_NAME_YOUR_PRICE -> 'name_your_price.wav', GUARD_BACK_ALREADY -> 'been_playing_in_the_sewers_have_we.wav' (reuse gruff greeting). All merchant/guard entries use BRUGG character so the directory is 'brugg'.

4. Add Chapter 2 SlicePhase enum values to composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/SlicePhase.kt. Insert before GAME_OVER: CHAPTER2_MARKET, CHAPTER2_MARKET_NPC, CHAPTER2_FOREST, CHAPTER2_FOREST_COMBAT, CHAPTER2_SHRINE, CHAPTER2_BOSS_INTRO, CHAPTER2_BOSS_COMBAT, CHAPTER2_POST_BOSS, CHAPTER2_QUESTBOOK_PAGE2, CHAPTER2_RETURN.

5. Add new EnemyArchetype values in composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/combat/EnemyArchetype.kt: FOREST_WOLF('Forest Wolf', maxHp=18, attackPower=5, AttackStyle.MELEE) and TAX_COLLECTOR_BADGER('The Tax Collector Badger', maxHp=80, attackPower=7).

6. Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/combat/TaxCollectorController.kt modeled on BossController.kt. Three phases: PHASE_1 (100%-50%): summon 2 FOREST_WOLF adds on start, throw tax forms (base attackPower). PHASE_2 (50%-25%): on transition emit BossPhaseChanged, escalate pressure to HIGH, spawn false marker 'Pay Here', base attackPower. PHASE_3 (25%-0%): heavy stamp attack (attackPower * 3), emit BarkEvent.VELLUM_BALANCE_LIFE_DEATH on phase transition.

7. Add new maps to composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/world/GameMaps.kt. Add trigger constants: TRIGGER_MARKET_EXIT, TRIGGER_FOREST_SHRINE, TRIGGER_FOREST_BOSS, TRIGGER_CHAPTER2_PAGE, TRIGGER_CHAPTER2_EXIT. Create stokeportMarket() function: 25x20 map with walls as buildings (#), floor as cobblestone (.), spawn (@) at top-left area, merchant NPC area (M trigger), guard area (G trigger), and exit to forest (E trigger) on the east side. Create forestTrail() function: 30x20 map with tree walls (#), floor as grass (.), spawn (@) at west, linear main path, a branch to hidden shrine (H trigger for TRIGGER_FOREST_SHRINE), boss area at east end (B trigger for TRIGGER_FOREST_BOSS), and a page pickup (P trigger).

8. Add new RoomContext companion constants in composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/questbook/RoomContext.kt: ROOM_MARKET = 'market', ROOM_FOREST = 'forest', ROOM_FOREST_SHRINE = 'forest_shrine', ROOM_FOREST_BOSS = 'forest_boss'.

9. Extend QuestbookProcessor.process() in composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/questbook/QuestbookProcessor.kt to handle the new Chapter 2 BarkEvents with specific reactions per the user specification: NIB_SMELL_GOLD in market -> 'Commercial Survey Initiated: Catalogue all vendor-adjacent valuables (Mandatory)' with SpawnQuestMarker. BRUGG_WHO_RUNS_THIS_CITY -> 'Municipal Inquiry Filed: Authority Structure Report (Budget: 0 Gold)' with FlavorText. VELLUM_CREATURES_IN_WOODS -> 'Wildlife Census Ordered: Document all woodland fauna (Deadline: Immediate)' with SpawnQuestMarker. VELLUM_ELEMENTS_MINE_TO_COMMAND -> 'Elemental Claim Registered: Command over elements noted (Scope: Undefined)' with FlavorText. VELLUM_CALLS_FOR_LIGHTNING in shrine context -> 'Electrical Works Permit: Granted (Safety Notice: None)' with RevealHidden effect. BRUGG_DROP_YOUR_WEAPONS (already exists, but update its reaction DURING BOSS context) -> 'Surrender Filing: Rejected (Reason: Insufficient Paperwork)' with FlavorText. VELLUM_BALANCE_LIFE_DEATH -> 'Existential Risk Assessment: Filed (Priority: Philosophical)' with FlavorText. Remaining new events (NIB_HOW_MUCH, NIB_SECRET_ENTRANCE, BRUGG_SPEAK_TO_GUARD, BRUGG_KEEP_TO_TRAIL, BRUGG_EXPERIENCE_IS_HOW_WE_GROW, VELLUM_SO_THATS_HOW_IT_IS, MERCHANT_*, GUARD_*) get flavor-text reactions.
acceptance_criteria: The project compiles successfully with ./gradlew build
./gradlew desktopTest passes (all existing tests still pass)
BarkEvent enum has 16 new Chapter 2 values
BarkRegistry init{} block does not throw (all new events have definitions)
BarkAudioRegistry init{} block does not throw (all new events have WAV mappings)
SlicePhase has 10 new Chapter 2 phase values
TaxCollectorController exists with 3-phase logic analogous to BossController
GameMaps has stokeportMarket() and forestTrail() functions returning valid TileMaps
QuestbookProcessor handles all new BarkEvents without falling through to a default or throwing
verification: Run ./gradlew desktopTest and confirm all tests pass
Run ./gradlew build and confirm compilation succeeds
